factors.label: Predicted winning margin
factors.detail: Our pre-game model's point estimate on current, complete rosters.

factors.label: Likely margin range (80%)
factors.detail: Calibrated from how far our past margin calls actually missed.

factors.label: Wider margin range (90%)

factors.label: Home win chance

note: Every figure is read from a core pipeline table — the deep page renders, it never computes.
